summary: Fase 3 Ledger States backend testing completed. 16/16 tests passed covering state machine transitions (valid + invalid), initialize/mark_completed/clear/dispute/refund helpers, cron services (auto_clear_after_grace, auto_complete_appointments), state summary aggregation, and API endpoints for dispute flow, finance funds-state breakdown, and admin dispute resolve (favor_business/favor_client/invalid).
critical_code_review_comments: funds_state.transition uses optimistic lock (find_one_and_update filtering on current funds_state) which is good - prevents concurrent state drift.

auto_complete_appointments queries bookings with status=CONFIRMED and appointment_date < cutoff (now-48h) via string-iso comparison. ISO-8601 UTC strings sort lexicographically correctly, so this is safe as long as all appointment_date values are stored as UTC iso strings with the same format. Confirmed via test with 50h-past record.
auto_clear_after_grace filters by funds_clears_at with $lte (iso string). Works correctly; verified the future-dated AVAILABLE tx is NOT cleared.
get_state_summary seeds all FundsState values with zero counts - good defensive UX.
Dispute endpoint accepts empty reason and defaults to 'Cliente reporto un problema' (as specified, no min-length validation in backend).
Re-dispute attempt on already-disputed tx correctly returns 400.
Admin dispute resolve correctly gates on funds_state==disputed and rejects invalid outcome with 400.

Audit log is created with AuditAction.PAYMENT_RELEASE or PAYMENT_HOLD for dispute resolutions - semantically slight mismatch but acceptable re-use of existing enum (consider adding DISPUTE_RESOLVE action).
Transaction terminal states (REFUNDED, PAID_OUT) correctly raise ValueError on any further transition.
test_credentials: Used provided admin (TOTP via /app/scripts/get_admin_totp.py), business testbiz_dashboard@test.com/TestBiz123!, and user testuser_stats@test.com/TestPass123!.
seed_data_creation: Test prefixes TEST_TX_ and TEST_BK_ used for inserts; cleaned up via pymongo in session teardown.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Fase 3 ledger is green. test_fase3_ledger.py can be reused as regression. If adding new state transitions update _ALLOWED_TRANSITIONS in services/funds_state.py and extend TestTransitions accordingly. Wallet-only path PENDING_HOLD init and Stripe webhook init were covered structurally via initialize() service tests (code paths /api/payments/deposit/checkout wallet_only and /api/system/webhook/stripe call the same services.funds_state.initialize); end-to-end Stripe webhook was not exercised live (Stripe in test mode).
